category.scope_note: Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, and IoT wireless device compliance comparison for export from China to Thailand.

title.en: China-to-Thailand Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix (NBTC)
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入泰国：NBTC合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入泰國：NBTC合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, and IoT device documentation against Thailand NBTC mandatory type approval (Radio Communications Act BE 2498 and Telecommunications Business Act BE 2544), TISI EMC standards (TIS 2366 / CISPR 32 emissions; CISPR 35 immunity), TISI electrical safety standards (IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1 adoption), in-country importer and authorised agent requirements, Thai-language labelling obligations, and ETDA IoT cybersecurity guidelines.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa及物联网设备文件与泰国NBTC强制型式批准（《无线电通信法》BE 2498及《电信业务法》BE 2544）、TISI电磁兼容标准（TIS 2366 / CISPR 32辐射；CISPR 35抗扰度）、TISI电气安全标准（采用IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1）、境内进口商及授权代理人要求、泰语标签义务以及ETDA物联网网络安全指南的差距对照。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa及物聯網設備文件與泰國NBTC強制型式批准（《無線電通訊法》BE 2498及《電信業務法》BE 2544）、TISI電磁相容標準（TIS 2366 / CISPR 32輻射；CISPR 35抗擾度）、TISI電氣安全標準（採用IEC 62368-1 / IEC 60950-1）、境內進口商及授權代理人要求、泰語標籤義務以及ETDA物聯網網路安全指南的差距對照。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, NBTC type approval, legal opinion, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and device manufacturers should verify current NBTC rules, applicable TISI technical standards, labelling requirements, and Thai market entry obligations with qualified regulatory professionals before importation or sale in Thailand.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、NBTC型式批准、法律意见、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和设备制造商在进口或于泰国销售前，应与合格监管专业人士核验现行NBTC规则、适用TISI技术标准、标注要求及泰国市场准入义务。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、NBTC型式批准、法律意見、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和設備製造商在進口或於泰國銷售前，應與合格監管專業人士核驗現行NBTC規則、適用TISI技術標準、標注要求及泰國市場准入義務。

answer_first.en: The main Thailand (NBTC) gaps for a China-made wireless, Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, cellular, LoRa, or IoT device are: (1) mandatory NBTC type approval under the Radio Communications Act BE 2498 and Telecommunications Business Act BE 2544 — SRRC, FCC, and CE approvals are not recognised; (2) Thai-language label displaying the NBTC type approval certificate number on the product or packaging; (3) appointment of an in-country Thai importer or authorised agent for the NBTC application; (4) EMC compliance to TISI TIS standards (TIS 2366 / CISPR 32 for emissions; CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4 series for immunity); and (5) electrical safety compliance to applicable TISI TIS standards (adopting IEC 60950-1 or IEC 62368-1) where mandatory TISI certification applies. Cybersecurity requirements are advisory only (ETDA guidelines) as of 2026-06-17. CCC is not recognised in Thailand.
answer_first.zh: 中国制造的无线、Wi-Fi、蓝牙、蜂窝、LoRa或物联网设备进入泰国（NBTC）市场的主要合规差距为：（1）依据《无线电通信法》BE 2498及《电信业务法》BE 2544，须强制取得NBTC型式批准——SRRC、FCC及CE认证均不被认可；（2）产品或包装须以泰语标注NBTC型式批准证书编号；（3）须在泰国境内委任进口商或授权代理人申请NBTC批准；（4）须依据TISI TIS标准满足电磁兼容要求（辐射：TIS 2366 / CISPR 32；抗扰度：CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4系列）；（5）适用强制TISI认证时，须符合TISI TIS电气安全标准（采用IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1）。截至2026年6月17日，网络安全要求仅为建议性（ETDA指南）。CCC在泰国不被认可。
answer_first.zht: 中國製造的無線、Wi-Fi、藍牙、蜂窩、LoRa或物聯網設備進入泰國（NBTC）市場的主要合規差距為：（1）依據《無線電通訊法》BE 2498及《電信業務法》BE 2544，須強制取得NBTC型式批准——SRRC、FCC及CE認證均不被認可；（2）產品或包裝須以泰語標注NBTC型式批准證書編號；（3）須在泰國境內委任進口商或授權代理人申請NBTC批准；（4）須依據TISI TIS標準滿足電磁相容要求（輻射：TIS 2366 / CISPR 32；抗擾度：CISPR 35 / IEC 61000-4系列）；（5）適用強制TISI認證時，須符合TISI TIS電氣安全標準（採用IEC 60950-1或IEC 62368-1）。截至2026年6月17日，網路安全要求僅為建議性（ETDA指南）。CCC在泰國不被認可。

editorial_controls.review_cycle: Quarterly or when NBTC or TISI publishes major rule changes
editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, and verification flag before human_reviewed can be set to true by a named reviewer
